name: Benjamin Leatherman
rationale: Phoenix New Times staff writer. Investigative-leaning AZ-only beat fits a school bus safety angle.

name: Alison Bethel
rationale: Top editor at Arizona Capitol Times. Owns the AZ legislative coverage that intersects with seat-belt mandate proposals.

name: Teri Hayt
rationale: Managing editor at AZ Capitol Times with day-to-day assignment authority for AZ school policy stories.

name: Jamar Younger
rationale: Yellow Sheet covers AZ legislative inside-baseball, including transportation committee activity.
personalization_hook: Saw your "Five things to watch this week at the Capitol" on April 27, 2026.

name: Brock Blasdell
rationale: Assistant editor at AZ Capitol Times helping shape AZ policy coverage.

name: Alexandra Hardle
rationale: K-12 education reporter at the largest newspaper in AZ. Direct beat fit for school transportation policy.
personalization_hook: Saw your piece on the Phoenix Union High School District Governing Board's approval of weapon detection systems.

name: Kimberly Thomas
org: Arizona Department of Public Safety, Student Transportation Unit
rationale: AZ's named state director for pupil transportation. Single most important agency contact on AZ school bus standards. Also serves as AZ contact for the National Association of State Directors of Pupil Transportation.

name: AZ DPS Student Transportation Unit
rationale: Official AZ DPS unit governing school bus inspection, equipment standards, and driver certification. Direct regulatory touchpoint for any seat belt rule discussion.

name: David Jacobson
rationale: Named transportation director for one of the largest AZ districts. Direct operator perspective on seat belt cost and ops impact.
personalization_hook: Saw your "Bus Safety Campaign to Combat Dangerous Driving Practices" media release addressing dangerous driving practices around school buses.

name: TUSD Transportation Department
rationale: Departmental inbox for Tucson Unified, one of the largest districts in AZ and the major Pima County target.
personalization_hook: Saw your work on the Student Transportation in School Buses Policy revision discussed in the KGUN9 report on TUSD bonds and school bus transportation safety.

name: Sam Gonzales
rationale: Named transportation director at Tempe Union HSD. Listed publicly with this departmental contact email.

name: CUSD Transportation Dispatch
rationale: Public transportation contact at Chandler Unified, one of the largest districts in AZ.

name: Jeff Kingsley
org: Deer Valley Unified School District / AAPT
rationale: Named AAPT board (President-Elect) and Deer Valley USD transportation contact. Bridges district ops to statewide pupil transport policy.

name: Deborah Hurt
org: Glendale Union High School District / AAPT
rationale: Named transportation leader at Glendale Union HSD and AAPT board officer.

name: Hilma Gustafson
org: Glendale Union High School District / AAPT
rationale: AAPT communications role and Glendale Union HSD transportation. Will see and likely share AZ-wide pupil transportation messaging.

name: Armando Cuellar
rationale: Named transportation leader at Phoenix Elementary and AAPT board contact.
personalization_hook: Saw your tribute to Ron Stacy as Past President of the Arizona Association for Pupil Transportation.

name: Shannon Weber
rationale: President of Transportation Administrators of Arizona. Senior elected voice for AZ pupil transportation.
personalization_hook: Saw your comments on School Bus Safety Week's "Danger Zone" focus in STN's podcast E87.

name: Kruze Mingus
org: Queen Creek Unified School District / TAA
rationale: TAA VP and Queen Creek USD transportation leader. Named officer of AZ statewide transport admin association.

name: Patrick Fleming
rationale: TAA communications officer, will likely amplify AZ pupil-transport coverage to district peers statewide.

name: Stephanie Arbaugh
rationale: AZ school risk-pool insurance leader on TAA. School-bus liability and crash exposure is core to her work.

name: Teresa Ramirez
org: Flowing Wells Unified School District / TAA
rationale: Tucson-area TAA officer and named district transportation leader. Adds southern AZ district perspective beyond TUSD.

name: AAPT (Arizona Association for Pupil Transportation)
rationale: Statewide professional association inbox for AZ pupil transportation. Catch-all for AAPT board awareness.
personalization_hook: Saw your announcement for the **2026 AAPT Fall Conference** on **October 10, 2026** at Tierra Del Sol Elementary School.

name: TAA President
rationale: Statewide TAA office of the president, persistent inbox across officer turnover.

name: Luisana Pozo De Jesus
org: Safe Kids Maricopa County / Child Crisis Arizona
rationale: Named SafeKids Maricopa coordinator. SafeKids leads child-passenger-safety advocacy in metro AZ.

name: SafeKids Maricopa
org: Safe Kids Maricopa County / Child Crisis Arizona
rationale: Maricopa County SafeKids coalition program inbox. Direct child-passenger-safety advocacy channel.
